global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: An exclusive offer for users to claim rewards.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'FluxStream' in bold, modern typography, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are displayed in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element appears in the lower section, adding visual interest without specific identification.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: The text 'Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime' is displayed in a bold, white font, making it stand out against the blue background.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is presented in a smaller font at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom reads 'Claim reward' in bold white text, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned near the top left, serving as a decorative element.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and vibrant, exclusive offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime, FluxStream, Claim reward, UGC
